hooks.command:
node -e "const f=process.env.CLAUDE_TOOL_ARG_FILE_PATH||''; if(f.endsWith('.ts')||f.endsWith('.tsx')){const{execSync}=require('child_process'); try{const r=execSync('npx tsc --noEmit --pretty 2>&1',{cwd:'/c/Users/USER/clawd/projects/flowmind',encoding:'utf8',timeout:55000}); console.log(r.split('
').slice(0,30).join('
'));}catch(e){console.log(e.stdout?e.stdout.split('
').slice(0,30).join('
'):'Type check failed');}}"

node -e "const f=process.env.CLAUDE_TOOL_ARG_FILE_PATH||''; const bad=['.env','secret','credential','password','token','apikey','private_key']; const hit=bad.find(b=>f.toLowerCase().includes(b)); if(hit){console.error('SECURITY BLOCKED: Cannot write to sensitive file containing: '+hit); process.exit(1);}"

node -e "const c=process.env.CLAUDE_TOOL_ARG_COMMAND||''; const blocked=['rm -rf /','rm -rf ~','rm -rf .','rm -rf src','DROP TABLE','DROP DATABASE','git push --force','git reset --hard','git clean -f','git checkout .']; const hit=blocked.find(b=>c.includes(b)); if(hit){console.error('BLOCKED: Destructive command detected: '+hit); process.exit(1);}"

cd /c/Users/USER/clawd/projects/flowmind && node -e "const{execSync}=require('child_process'); try{const r=execSync('grep -rn --include=*.ts --include=*.tsx -E "(ANTHROPIC_API_KEY|password\s*=\s*[^\s]+|secret\s*=\s*[^\s]+)" src/ 2>/dev/null',{encoding:'utf8'}); if(r.trim()){console.error('SECURITY WARNING: Potential secrets in code:
'+r.split('
').slice(0,5).join('
'));}}catch(e){} console.log('Security scan complete');"
